svg.text: Phase 2 summary — best val epoch (end-to-end fine-tuning)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does best val mIoU of 97.24 mean for ConvNeXt in phase 2?')
sendPrompt('Why did both models peak at epoch 14 in phase 2?')
sendPrompt('What does 99.1 percent pixel accuracy mean for deployment?')
sendPrompt('Why does Swin edge ahead on mean class accuracy at epoch 14?')
sendPrompt('Why did Swin gain more from phase 2 fine-tuning than ConvNeXt?')
sendPrompt('What does the gap narrowing to 0.17 pp mean for model selection?')

svg.text: Swin gained more from fine-tuning (+2.18 pp vs +1.31 pp) — gap narrowed from 1.04 pp to 0.17 pp
